title: Steve Schneider
compiled_truth: Steve Schneider is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-11), Steve Schneider sent 13 and received 232 emails, totalling 245 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dan Hyvl](people/dan-hyvl) (11), [Tom Shelton](people/tom-shelton) (4), [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (4), [Brad Blevins](people/brad-blevins) (3), [James Ducote](people/james-ducote) (3).
